error_miner_url_missing: Error: No download URL found for this miner. Please check your internet connection or API status.

settings.av_warning_text: Mining software is often detected as a threat. Please add this folder as an exception in your antivirus software or Windows Defender so that the software is not automatically deleted.
settings.logs_desc: Open the log file for diagnostic purposes.

addresses.title: Address Management
addresses.confirm_delete: Do you really want to delete this address?
addresses.get_wallet_hint: If you don't already have Raptoreum, you can choose a wallet and set up an address at raptoreum.com.

mining.title: Mining
mining.expert_warning: Warning: Custom parameters are at your own risk!
mining.error_no_path: Please first specify a download path in the settings!
mining.error_invalid_address: The selected address is not a valid RTM address!
mining.auth_message: Do you want to start the miner with admin privileges? This enables MSR mode and significantly increases hashrate.
